message:
fix: Reset control_flow_terminated after function generation

Critical bug fix: When a function body contained a raise/return statement,
the control_flow_terminated flag remained true after function generation
completed. This prevented subsequent module-level statements (like
`if __name__ == "__main__"`) from being generated.

Also fixes empty set/frozenset type inference to use i64 (matching codegen)
instead of .unknown which became *runtime.PyObject.

This fix enables test_set.py and other tests to properly generate their
unittest.main() entry points.
